dialogos.texto_en: Hey, Ichika...\nDo you know why I'm so exhausted\nwhen we're about to go sightseeing?
Sorry about that. I got too excited.\nIt's Okinawa and I'm with you, Futaro-kun.
...Well, as long as you had fun.
Ehehe...\nThank you, Futaro-kun.
Good morning, Uesugi-san!\nMooorning to you too, Ichika!
Hey, good morning.\nYou're quite energetic this morning.
Uesugi-san and Ichika...\nHmm? What, you're already tired?
Yeah, a little.
Hmm?\nI wonder why you're tired, eeeh.
W-what's with that look?
Don't tell me.
Ho-hold on a second.\nThere's nothing going on, okay?
Really?
Really, really!\nBut%p-2;――
But, big bro, you and Ichika-san were up together last night,\nriiight?
R-Raiha-chan?!
It's not what it sounds like!\nWe were just%p-2;――
You're being awfully defensive.
Futaro,\nyou should be careful\nabout what you say from now on.
I'm telling you, it's not like thaaat!
Fine, fine.\nTime is limited, so why don't we put that conversation\non hold and start our journey?
Yeah!\nOcean Expo Park is farther than we thought.
Yeah, we'll get back to the nitty gritty on the way there.
Itsuki-chan, your eyes are scary!\nIt's honestly a misunderstanding!
